title: Method signature differs from trait declaration
explanation: This error occurs when a method in a trait implementation has a different signature (parameters, return type, or bounds) than what the trait declared. The implementation must exactly match the trait definition.
error_message: error[E0053]: method `process` has an incompatible type for trait
tip: Copy the method signature from the trait definition to ensure an exact match, then fill in the body. Your IDE can often generate the impl skeleton for you.
